name: agentic-engineering-kit
description: Codex skills for scoped planning, test-first implementation, evidence-based debugging, and project guardrail scaffolding.

interface.shortDescription: Scoped planning, TDD, debugging, and guardrails for Codex projects.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that packages agentic engineering workflows: clarify non-trivial work before coding, implement clear slices with test-first verification, diagnose bugs from reproduction evidence, and scaffold project guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use $agentic-scaffold to apply this kit here.
Use $agentic-diagnose to debug this from reproduction.
